_doc: Match-level tuning. Mirrors design/gdd/team-assignment.md and design/gdd/respawn-system.md tuning knobs. Server reads at boot.
_anticheat_doc: Server clamps horizontal step per transform packet. max_step = max_horizontal_speed * dt + tolerance. Higher tolerance = more lag-friendly but easier to teleport-cheat.
_flow_doc: Match phase durations. waiting → warmup (when both teams have ≥1) → in_progress → post_match → waiting (reset). Production round duration is 10 minutes.
_score_doc: Teams score from owned control points. Kills do not add match points by default; set kill_score_points > 0 if you want hybrid scoring.
_control_points_doc: Control point centers mirror the three RedZone instances in Main.tscn. height_m is tall so helicopters can capture while hovering over a point.
